creator: johann@egenetics.com
text:
- "Dive Into Python" is a tutorial book on the Python language, aimed at
  experienced programmers and published under the GNU FDL.
- Seccond attempt at submitting this port, the major difference being that
  the author has agreed to make versioned distfiles available, which should
  obviate wca's objection.  :-)
- This port installs the book in various formats under ${PREFIX}/share/doc
